response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the three songs ('Ochame Kinou', 'Lead Control', and 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy') through on-screen text in the video. 2. Used the search tool to find the original lyrics for each song, using the composers (Gojimira-P, Narumiya, and Maiki-P, respectively) as the primary search keyword. 3. Formatted the scene data and lyrics as a structured JSON object according to the instructions, ensuring correct escaping of quotes and newlines.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a medley of vocal performances by various VTubers, including 'Ochame Kinou', 'Lead Control', and 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy'.

scenes.description: Four VTubers perform the song 'Ochame Kinou'. On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
いつでも I love you
君に Take kiss me
忘れられないから 僕の大事なメモリー
どら焼きは主食になれない
ならば上書きしちゃえば 僕の思い通り
ずっとそばで見てるよ バックアップは任せて
左から右へと 出来事があっちこっちどっち
君はここにいるの?
(バースディ) 誕生日まだ先でしょ?
いい加減に小指から 見えない糸主張しない
乾いた心臓の音 淡いうわ言
癪に障るなんて気にしてるからに決まってんじゃん
それでも信じて幸せになるように礼儀正しく
まずは些細な挨拶とこから are you ready?
いつでも I love you
君に Take kiss me
忘れられないから 僕の大事なメモリー
どら焼きは主食になれない
ならば上書きしちゃえば 僕の思い通り
夢からピピピ覚めないで覚めないで
ぬくもり逃げないでまだ朝はたっぷりあるから
あと5分いや10分待たせて
100年後続くなら約束圧縮して
間違ったメールから...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Whenever I love you
Take kiss me
Because I can't forget my precious memory
Dorayaki can't be a staple food
If so, why not overwrite it just as I wish?
I'm always watching by your side, leave the backup to me
From left to right
Events are here and there, which one is it?
Are you here?
(Birthday) It's still a while away, isn't it?
Give me a break, claiming there's an invisible string from your pinky
Dried heartbeat sound
Words of delirium
It's because you're worried about things that irritate you, obviously
Even so, believe in happiness, and straighten up your manners
First of all, start with a trivial greeting, are you ready?
Whenever I love you
Take kiss me
Because I can't forget my precious memory
Dorayaki can't be a staple food
If so, why not overwrite it just as I wish?
Don't wake up from the dream, beep-beep-beep, don't wake up
Don't let the warmth escape, there's still plenty of morning left
Wait for me 5 minutes, no, 10 minutes
If it continues 100 years later, compress the promise
From the mistaken email...
